hero.title: Travel safely from Cusco to Quillabamba

security.title: Safety
security.desc: Modern units with GPS and certified drivers for your peace of mind.

comfort.title: Comfort
comfort.desc: Reclining seats and spacious areas for a pleasant journey.

punctuality.title: Punctuality
punctuality.desc: We meet established schedules so you can plan without worries.

about.title: About us
about.description: Inversiones K'intu is a ground transportation company based in Cusco, dedicated to providing safe, comfortable, and punctual service on the Cusco – Quillabamba route. With years of experience in the sector, we are committed to the satisfaction of our passengers.
